inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Calibration factor. Standard is 100 cm/m. Adjust if using non-standard units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Calibration factor. Standard is 100 cm/m. Adjust if using non-standard units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalibrasyon faktörü. Standart 100 cm/m'dir. Standart dışı birimler kullanılıyorsa ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kalibrierfaktor. Standard ist 100 cm/m. Bei nicht standardmäßigen Einheiten anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'étalonnage. La valeur standard est 100 cm/m. Ajuster si des unités non standard sont utilisées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de calibración. El estándar es 100 cm/m. Ajuste si usa unidades no estándar.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Relative uncertainty of the measurement, for error propagation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative uncertainty of the measurement, for error propagation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hata yayılımı için ölçümün bağıl belirsizliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Unsicherheit der Messung für die Fehlerfortpflanzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude relative de la mesure, pour la propagation des erreurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre relativa de la medición, para propagación de errores.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output rounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for output rounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı yuvarlama için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgaberundung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi du résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el redondeo de salida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
